Appearances:
Plaintiff JAMES FITZPATRICK is present.
Attorney DANIEL CHEUNG for the plaintiff.
Defendant DANIEL GREWEN is present.
Attorney W. ALEX CHRISTOPER appearing for defendant in full scope.

The Judge Pro Tem MARK SCHREIBER, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501-A,
for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of FEB-10-2014 remains on calendar. (501/JPT)
